text:
Sea salt and freshly ground white pepper
2-3 tbsp cold-pressed rapeseed oil

Halve the fennel bulbs and slice them as thinly as possible, using a mandolin or very sharp knife. Tip into a bowl, add the cider vinegar and season
To taste. Toss to mix and leave for about an hour, stirring every so often
Chop the green fennel tops and add to the fennel with the rapeseed oil. Toss to combine, then taste and adjust the seasoning if necessary. Serve within a couple of hours.
